body: That's a bug and it's probably me and my greek keyboard that might have introduced it...
title: Replaces greek capital N with latin N in variable names...

body:
in main, the default behavior is defined for an asynchronous distributed architecture and methods are further specialized for a synchronized architecture

in light of #4301, it is a better pattern to have the default behavior being the one of a synchronized architecture and specialize the methods for an asynchronous architecture...
title: Switch default behavior of `Distributed` architecture

body:
If we use `synchronized_communication = false` we use all the kernel chopping methods for MPI that might (and do!) conflict with the sharding pipelining

Edit: if we merge #4302 we do not need to extend the methods for `Distributed{<:ReactantState, nothing}`, so this PR can be simplified to add only the changes in `ext/OceananigansReactantExt/Architectures.jl`
title: Undo pipelining for a `ShardedDistributed` architecture

body:
while working on #4293 I noticed that I was filling the metrics incorrectly for the `LatitudeLongitudeGrid`, leading to incorrect solutions.

This error stems from the fact that the same metrics are ordered differently for a `LatitudeLongitudeGrid` and an `OrthogonalSphericalShellGrid`. I think this might be a big source of error if a developer is not very careful (like me), so I think it's a good idea unifying the two grids.

In this PR I am reordering the metrics of the latitude longitude grid to match the ones of the orthogonal spherical shell grid.
We could do also the other way around, however I like having the center-center at the top (just aesthetic personal preference)
title: Swap around latitude longitude metrics
